use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF HYPERURICEMIA ASSOCIATED WITH GOUT IN PATIENTS WHO HAVE NOT ACHIEVED TARGET SERUM URIC ACID LEVELS WITH A MEDICALLY APPROPRIATE DAILY DOSE OF ALLOPURINOL ALONE
